repoFiles.README.md:
# DayZero Backend Sandbox

Focus: Backend Engineering

This repository simulates team workflows for backend onboarding tasks.

tasks.title: Configure Billing Database Connection
tasks.description: Set up BillingDBConnector and validate connection response handling.

tasks.title: Implement Validation and Logging
tasks.description: Add structured logging and input validation in billing service methods.

repoFiles.README.md:
# DayZero Frontend Sandbox

Focus: Frontend Development

This repository simulates component and UI workflow tasks.

tasks.title: Build Reusable Task Card
tasks.description: Create a reusable task card component with status states and CTA button.
hints: Use props for title and status

tasks.title: Wire Dashboard Data State
tasks.description: Connect task data to dashboard cards and render today/weekly sections.

repoFiles.README.md:
# DayZero DevOps Sandbox

Focus: DevOps / CI/CD

This repository simulates pipeline and deployment workflow tasks.
repoFiles..github/workflows/build.yml:
name: Build
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
repoFiles.Dockerfile:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN npm ci
CMD ["npm","run","start"]

tasks.title: Add Lint Stage to Pipeline
tasks.description: Update the pipeline mock to run lint before build.
acceptanceCriteria: Pipeline order is lint then build
tasks.starterCode:
name: Build
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: npm run build
